creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
Created attachment 259317
Patch to upgrade x11/nvidia-driver-390 and x11/linux-nvidia-libs-390 to 390.157

Patch to upgrade x11/nvidia-driver-390 and x11/linux-nvidia-libs-390 to the latest (legacy) version 390.157.
Other legacy drivers are up-to-date or deleted as vulnerable.

Tested fetch, build and package on stable/14, amd64.
Cannot test for i386 (specifying CPUTYPE was insufficient to test).

Currently not yet opened review for this, as possibly both of masterports are required to be updated first to address newly arose suspend/resume issue.
This is currently discussed on review D49245.
